text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I wonder what's going on...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um... We're finally on a temple date, but my
engines are totally cold.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Am I sick or something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: P-please, Nyankichi! I told you I can't right now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? That voice...

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Nice Nature—with a cat!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing here? Are you two playing
hide-and-seek?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: N-no... I hope I'm not being a bother...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, the love fortunes here are so famous!
They're basically a must-do for couples... That's
why you're here, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Love fortunes?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That sounds like fun! ♪ Let's go get one, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Not that I need a fortune to know we're perfect
for each other! ☆ But still... it sounds exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As per Mayano Top Gun's wish, we go and grab a
love fortune.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What does it say? Show me, show me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Whoa! "Your love is on a direct flight to
success!" Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My! Even the gods have recognized you as the
best couple ever! How lovely!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. The best couple ever...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks, Trainer! You too, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Think nothing of it. I had fun too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still, you're as naive as—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahem. I mean, as cute as always.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really? Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is right back to her normal self
thanks to the fortune.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You get along fine?! That's it?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
F-fine... fine... Get along fine... What does that
even mean?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
D-don't stress over it! Getting along fine takes
work too! It means your relationship is stable!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... You're right! It's just a silly fortune!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep, something like that would never bother a
grown-up like me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My! Of course! You are the cream of the
grown-up crop, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh. I already knew that.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... I guess that wasn't good enough for you.
I should've known.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the fortune being what it was, Mayano Top
Gun is unable to return to her normal self...
